theme_notes: Taglines drawn from the 2026 FIFA World Cup group stage (USA beat Australia 2-0 today, Canada beat Qatar 6-0, Morocco scored the fastest World Cup goal ever at 1:10), the US-Iran nuclear talks collapsing into a 60-day renegotiation window, Hugh Jackman's Robin Hood film release, and DHS expanding ICE facial recognition to local police.
settled: The balance sheet is cleaner than the US-Iran nuclear talks. Respect.
88 World Cup goals, zero dollars owed. This is what peak civilization looks like.
Hugh Jackman is out here robbing the rich. You two are just balanced. Nicer.
youOwe: Morocco scored at 1:10. You've owed this longer than that.
Less than a World Cup program. More than your dignity right now.
The DHS is tracking faces now. Your debt already has a file.
You're in the group stage of debt. Still theoretical. Don't get comfortable.
Robin Hood would transfer this to your partner's account and look heroic doing it.
Iran canceled nuclear talks. Don't you dare cancel your payment.
Canada beat Qatar 6-0. You are Qatar. Let that sink in.
More than a World Cup ticket. Less than your self-respect. Complicated math.
Hugh Jackman is Robin Hood now. You're the Sheriff who's running a tab.
ICE is at every border with facial recognition. Your debt has its own mugshot.
The US beat Australia 2-0 today. Your net score in this relationship is worse.
Iran gets 60 days to renegotiate. You are getting zero.
Knockout stage. No draws. Someone exits. It won't be the person you owe.
Robin Hood steals from people like you to give to people like your partner. He'd approve.
A US-Iran negotiator earns less per diem than this. They also work harder.
Canada beat Qatar by six. Your dignity is down by more.
The entire World Cup host committee is less leveraged than you right now.
Hugh Jackman plays the hero. There's no version of this movie where you are.
theyOwe: They owe less than a World Cup stadium beer. But they still ordered it on your tab.
Morocco scored in 70 seconds. You'll wait longer than that to see this money.
Smaller than an ICE surveillance budget line. Somehow harder to collect.
Robin Hood would say this is beneath him. You still deserve every cent.
Iran got 60 days to renegotiate. Your partner gets zero. Enforce it.
The World Cup is in their city and they still can't find an ATM.
Switzerland is still in the World Cup. So is this debt, frustratingly.
Hugh Jackman steals from the rich. They're stealing from you. Less cinematic.
The US-Iran talks had a formal timeline. Make one. Notarize it.
ICE can find a face in any crowd. How has your partner evaded accountability?
USA beat Australia 2-0 today. Your partner can't manage a bank transfer. Embarrassing.
Brazil is handling their group. You are being handled. Differently.
Robin Hood gave to the poor. They just kept your money. Not as charming.
The World Cup is on American soil and they owe you this much. The founding fathers weep.
Hugh Jackman robs kings and nobles. You're being robbed by your housemate. Less glamorous.
The US canceled Iran talks over less. Consider your diplomatic options.
This could fund a small country's entire World Cup squad. They spent it on nothing.
Robin Hood is coming. He's going to steal from them and give it to you. Finally.
